title: EDS Wooden Hand Brush Stiff Bristle Scrubbing Brush Natural Bassine Heavy Duty Cleaning Brush for Outdoors Yard Floor and Carpet Brush(PACK OF 2)
features: Heavy-Duty Cleaning: Stiff bristles hand brush are excellent for removing stubborn dirt, grime, and debris from surfaces that require more aggressive scrubbing. These brushes are well-suited for textured surfaces, such as concrete, brick, and rough flooring, where dirt can become deeply embedded.

Versatility: Stiff bristle hand brushes are used for outdoor cleaning tasks, such as scrubbing decks, patios, driveways, and outdoor furniture. These brushes can also be used indoors for cleaning heavily soiled areas like workshop floors, garage floors, or other hard surfaces.

Stiff Bristles: The defining feature of this brush is its stiff bristles, which are made from durable materials like natural bassine. Stiff bristles are effective for agitating and loosening dirt and grime from surfaces that require more abrasive cleaning. Stiff bristles are less likely to wear out quickly, ensuring the brush remains effective over time.

Long Handled Scrubbing Brush: The handle's design allows for easy gripping, making it effortless to hold and control the brush during use. This brush is designed for heavy-duty cleaning tasks, suggesting that it is suitable for tackling tough and stubborn dirt, grime, and debris.

Easy to Clean: Hand brush is designed to be easy to clean is a great advantage. After each use, it's important to remove any trapped dirt, debris, or cleaning agents from the bristles to maintain hygiene and prevent cross-contamination. A hanging hole in the handle of a hand brush is a practical feature that allows you to conveniently hang the brush when it's not in use.
description: Product Description Convenient Easy to clean and prevent deformation of the brush. There is a small hole on the top of the wooden handle, which is convenient for hanging the brush anywhere to dry. Durable Handle Highly resistant to tear, Durable enough for daily use. Gives you comfortable grip with natural smooth lacquered wood handle, you will find it easy to remove dust and debris ,it is more comfortable than short handles and more durable than plastic handles. Multi-function The brush is the strongest bench brush because of bristle quality and balance. This brush could also be used as a furniture brush, counter, drafting or patio brush. ALL PURPOSE Natural Wood Brush can be used indoor and outdoor cleaning and sweeping efficiently to remove unwanted particles from any surface.
